title: BROWSE OPC
body: Live OPC browser — see tag values from your PLC. If you see tags here, the PLC connection is working.
code:
OPC Quick Client:
  Server: Ignition OPC-UA Server
  Browse: expand the tree

  [Ignition OPC-UA Server]
    └ Devices
        └ PLC1
            └ Program:MainProgram
                └ your_tag = 42.5

Empty → check device status
Red X → check network/IP/path
key: Tag paths match what tag config uses
mistakes: Confusing Quick Client with the Tag Browser
Browsing before the device finishes connecting
